{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":563791,"duration_api_ms":524480,"num_turns":57,"result":"Step 2 complete. Summary of what changed:

- **`tokens.css`** — full v0.2 rewrite per `TOKENS.md` SSOT. Light defaults registered via Tailwind v4 `@theme`; dark values mirrored in `:root[data-theme="dark"]` and `@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) :root:not([data-theme="light"])` so manual toggle always wins over OS. Tiny v0.1→v0.2 alias surface kept (option 1).
- **`base.css`** — `color-scheme: light dark`, link transition uses `--duration-base`/`--ease-out`, focus ring uses `--color-focus-ring`, `::selection` uses `--color-accent-soft`, `prefers-reduced-motion` zeroes motion. Components untouched.
- **`apps/blog/src/styles/global.css`** — dropped duplicate `@import 'tailwindcss'` and tokens import; `base.css` is the single entry now.
- **`packages/theme-default/src/scripts/theme-init.ts`** — pure `applyStoredTheme(root, storage)` + `themeInitScript` IIFE string. BaseLayout will inline the string in step 3.
- **`tests/theme-init.test.ts`** — 9 tests covering dark/light/empty/unknown/throwing-storage and the inline-script shape, no DOM env required.

AC: `pnpm -r typecheck` ✅ · `pnpm lint` ✅ · `pnpm test` 426/426 ✅ · `pnpm --filter blog build` ✅ + audit 0 violations.
